question: Which income level contributes the most to the customer base in the final year shown?

options.A: The purple segment represents the dominant income level in the final year.
options.B: The green segment corresponds to the largest income level group in the final year.
options.C: Cannot determine which specific income level contributes the most without a legend explaining the colors.
options.D: The red segment clearly indicates the largest income level share in the final year.

explanation: The chart displays different colored segments but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category has the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
